example: We were both young when I first saw you on a balcony.
I closed my eyes, and the flashbacks start to stand in there.
See you make your way through the crowd and say hello.
We owe you a throwin' pebbles.
And I was cryin' on a staircase, begging you please don't go.
So I sneak out to the garden to see you.
We keep quiet, cause we're dead.
You will be the prince, and I'll be the princess.
You will be the prince, and I'll be the princess.
Don't be afraid, we'll make it out of this lesson.
When I met you on the outskirts of town.
Go pick out a white dress.
